name: shadcn/ui
summary: A real shadcn/ui flavor (#2022) — the default zinc theme transcribed as a full DTCG override (near-black primary, 0.625rem radius seed, neutral border/input/muted roles, a 3px focus ring). Loaded through the #2017 manifest loader; its paired gap list records what tokens+intents reproduce and what needs a new intent/trait/token role.
